strings.settings.title: Faatulagaga
strings.settings.subtitle: Faatulagaga o le Polokalame
strings.lang.title: Gagana
strings.lang.intro: O gagana autu ua faafaigaluegaina. Sii mai lau gagana mo faaliliuga atoa e leai se initaneti — faamatalaga, tala faaleagaga ma isi.
strings.lang.failed: Na tenna le sii mai. Siaki le fesootaiga, ona toe taumafai.
strings.settings.units.desc: O le auala e faaalia ai mamao.
strings.settings.night.desc: O le mumu loloto e puipui ai mata ua masani i le pouliuli — o le malamalama mumu e itiiti lava ona afaina le va'ai i le po.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: E otometi ona mumu pe a pogisa le lagi pe a mae'a le sā o le la.
strings.settings.location.desc: O le nofoaga o le lagi e faitauina ai.
strings.settings.haptics.desc: Tetete pe a tofotofoina le sini.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Faitau i le leo le sini ma faatonu — mo le faaaoga lima-saoloto ma tagata e le vaaia.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Faaleleia vaivai ina ia fetaui lelei laina fetu ma ala o satellite i le lagi moni.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.paywall.title: Tatala le Lagi Atoa
strings.paywall.subtitle: Faatau e tasi. Leai ni totogi masina, leai ni akaone — sa ia oe e faavavau, atoa le initaneti.
strings.paywall.feature.favorites: Mea fiafia e leai se palota
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Masini Taimi — vaai i le lagi i soʻo se aso
strings.paywall.feature.events: Mea tutupu i le lagi — solo la, ua uila, faatasia
strings.paywall.feature.night: Vaai i le po atoa (samasama, otometi, malosi)
strings.paywall.comingSoon: O le a tatalaina faatauina talu mai nei — faaaoga se code tatalaina i le taimi nei.
strings.paywall.error: O se mea sese. Toe taumafai.
strings.paywall.restoreNone: E leai se faatauina muamua na maua.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Filifili se sini e sailia i le lagi
strings.stars.title: Fetu
strings.stars.subtitle: Fetu igoa {n} e sili ona manino
strings.deepsky.title: Le Lagi Loloto
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Fetu, kofu, kalaesi, ma faalapotopotoga {n}
strings.constellations.title: Fetu Faalapotopotoga
strings.constellations.subtitle: {n} ata fetu lauiloa
strings.satellites.title: Satellite
strings.events.title: Mea Tutupu i le Lagi
strings.events.subtitle: O le a o loʻo sau — 누uu i le taimi tafao
strings.events.calculating: O loʻo faitauina mea tutupu o loʻo sau…
strings.search.name: Saili i le igoa…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: E leai ni mea fiafia — Tatalaina se mea, ona 누uu i ★ e faaopoopo.
strings.list.empty.visible: E leai se mea i luga o le horizon nei — Taumafai "Faaali uma".
strings.list.empty.search: E leai se mea fetaui ma lau saili.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: E leai ni fetu i le lisi i luga o le horizon nei.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: E leai ni mea lagi loloto i luga o le horizon nei.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: E leai se tasi o nei faalapotopotoga i luga o le horizon nei.
strings.sat.overheadDay: O loʻo i luga nei ae malamalama le la
strings.sat.overheadShadow: O loʻo i luga nei ae i le ata o le Lalolagi
strings.sat.noPass: E leai ni alu atu e vaaia talu mai nei
strings.fav.empty:
E leai ni mea fiafia.
Tatalaina soʻo se paneta poʻo fetu, ona 누uu i ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: E leai se tasi o au mea fiafia i luga o le horizon nei.
strings.fav.noMatch: E leai se mea fiafia fetaui ma lau saili.
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} i lalo o le horizon — Faʻasino i lalo e ui i le Lalolagi.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} e le o i luga nei — 누uu faʻamatalaga mo le alu atu e soso'o mai.
strings.point.permBody: O loʻo faaali e Planet Pointer se fana faatonu i luga o le vitio mea pueata ola e faailo {name}.
strings.info.passNote: Taimi o le itumalo. Maualuga o le tumutumu = susulu, faigofie le alu atu.
strings.ev.lunarSub: O loʻo ui le Masina i le ata o le Lalolagi
strings.ev.solarSub: O loʻo ui le Masina i luma o le La
strings.ev.iss: ISS e ui atu i luga
strings.time.title: Masini Taimi
strings.time.subtitle: Vaai i le lagi i soʻo se aso poʻo taimi.
strings.time.return: Toe foi i le taimi nei
